SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF MILAN JR, OSWALD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-18-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PHANOTE, KUSUMA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY MILAN JR, OSWALD AS TO DEFENDANT PHANOTE, KUSUMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT PHANOTE, KUSUMA ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF MILAN JR, OSWALD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILAN JR, OSWALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PHANOTE, KUSUMA THE TESTIMONY AND EVIDENCE WAS INSUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF'S PAYMENTS WERE A LOAN. THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT DOES NOT HAVE THE POWER OR AUTHORITY TO ADDRESS QUESTIONS CONCERNING PATERNITY OF THE EXPECTED CHILD, OR THE LEGITIMACY OF THE PARTIES MARRIAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
